title: F.A. modpack
description: A modpack for simplify playing on my own server
body:
This is a custom modpack created for my private Minecraft server. It features an extensive selection of mods that enhance gameplay, exploration, automation, magic, and technology.

How to Join

If you want to join my server, please contact me via my social networks and provide your Minecraft nickname to be added to the whitelist:


- [Discord](https://discord.com/users/nicjkj1) 

- [Telegram](https://t.me/Nickj1s)

Included Mods

This modpack includes a variety of modifications, covering multiple gameplay aspects such as building, automation, RPG elements, and adventure. Here are some of the key mods featured in this pack:

Technology & Automation:

- [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applied-energistics-2)
- [Create Nuclear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-nuclear)
- [Create: Ironworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-ironworks)
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-steam-n-rails)
- [CC: Tweaked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cc-tweaked)

Magic & RPG Elements:

- [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine)
- [Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins)
- [Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paladins-priests)
- [Wizards (RPG Series)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizards)
- [Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rogues-warriors)

Adventure & Exploration:

- [YUNG's Better Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-structures)
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-and-taverns)
- [When Dungeons Arise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise)
- [Towns and Towers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/towns-and-towers)
- [The Aether](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-aether)

Farming & Food:

- [Farmer’s Delight Refabricated](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight-refabricated)
- [Expanded Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/expanded-delight)
- [Ad Astra Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ad-astra-delight)

Performance & UI Improvements:

- [Sodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sodium)
- [BetterF3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterf3)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immediatelyfast)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reeses-sodium-options)

Additional Features & Utility Mods:

- [Trinkets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trinkets)
- [Chunk Loaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-loaders)
- [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
- [Inventory Management](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-management)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mouse-tweaks)

For a full list of included mods, please check the Version Dependencies section of the modpack.

Enjoy your adventure!
